title: Snow
tagline: Single-channel video of a Boston snowstorm at 1fps
description: A 12-hour time-lapse video of a Boston snowstorm compressed to 8 minutes by shooting at 1fps and playing back at 24fps.
what: Fixed camera, south-facing window, January 2020. Shot on a DSLR at 1fps for 12 hours during a major storm. Presented as a single-channel loop with no sound.
why: Snowstorms are events. Time-lapse makes them processes. Slowing the time further makes them almost geological — the city disappearing and reappearing under accumulation.
